title: Prostate-Specific Antigen (PSA) Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ve prostate cancer. 
If you had a PSA test to monitor prostate cancer or treatment , ask your provider what a high PSA level means. Your provider will usually look at several tests results over time to get a better understanding of your condition.
If you have questions about your results, talk with your provider.
Learn more about laboratory tests, reference ranges, and understanding results .
